title: Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve
description: Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve is a wildlife sanctuary in Chandrapur district of Maharashtra state in India. It is Maharashtra's oldest and largest national park, known for its significant population of Bengal tigers.

title: Karnala Bird Sanctuary
description: The Karnala Bird Sanctuary is located in Panvel Taluka of Raigad District, outside Mumbai, India near Matheran and Karjat. The sanctuary is quite small but it is home to over 150 species of resident and 37 species of migratory birds.

title: Sanjay Gandhi National Park
description: Sanjay Gandhi National Park is a protected area in Mumbai, Maharashtra State in India. It is notable as one of the few national parks existing within a metropolis limit and is one of the most visited parks in the world.
